heading: Enforcement of forfeitures
label: 11504 Enforcement of forfeitures
text: When an offense by a seaman also is a criminal violation, it is not necessary that a criminal proceeding be brought to enforce a forfeiture.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)1150446:705Section 11504 provides that when a seaman has committed a criminal offense, a forfeiture may be enforced through civil proceedings.
